summary: Phase 11 (4-Zone Bottom Nav + Dual-Role Switcher + Settings Panel with GDPR) fully tested. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases pass covering /api/auth/me dual-role fields, switch-view (specialist toggle, 403 for client/admin/operator/pending), profile patch, change-password (correct+wrong+same), account-export (structured JSON), account-delete error paths (400 missing STERGE, 401 wrong password), dual-role authorization (specialist in client view can POST /api/requests; in specialist view returns 403), and scoped list_properties/list_requests by effective_role. Frontend: All 4 dashboards render 4 bottom-nav tabs with correct data-testids (client-tab-*, spec-tab-*, admin-tab-*, op-tab-*). SettingsPanel renders with all 7-8 rows. row-switch-view appears ONLY for verified specialist. Dual-role switch correctly navigates /specialist <-> /client and shows 'Profil activ: Client' badge in DashShared. Profile/Password/Privacy modals open with correct fields (profile-name-input, pwd-current, export-data-btn, show-delete-btn). No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2874 lines — recommend splitting into routers (auth.py, properties.py, requests.py, admin.py, gdpr.py) for maintainability.
PATCH /api/auth/profile correctly returns 400 on empty payload (validated). Good.
switch-view rejects unverified specialist with 403 (verified by pending@propmanage.io fixture).
list_requests filtering uses effective_role correctly: client-view specialists see only own client requests; specialist-view sees open or assigned-to-them.
Console shows benign 401 from initial /api/auth/me before login — could be silenced by skipping fetch when no cookie present (minor UX).
test_credentials: All from /app/memory/test_credentials.md; pending@propmanage.io / Spec123! also seeded (verified in seed loop) and used for unverified-specialist 403 path. Operator password was rotated and reverted during change-password test.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed; tests create+delete a TEST_DualRole_Property and a few TEST_-prefixed requests. spec1 active_view reset to 'specialist' after test suite (verified post-run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 fully green. Auth login path is /login (NOT /auth). Settings rows under SettingsPanel use tids: row-profile, row-password, row-switch-view (verified spec only), row-referral, row-review-app, row-support, row-contact, row-privacy, row-logout. Bottom-nav tids pattern: {prefix}-tab-{id} where prefix in {client, spec, admin, op}. Modal tids: profile-modal, password-modal, privacy-modal; close buttons {tid}-close. Specialist active_view should always be reset to 'specialist' before frontend tests start (currently reset).
rca of the issue: N/A — all assertions passed on first or second iteration (the only test fixes were payload validation: rooms required for /api/properties and priority enum is 'normal'|'urgent', not 'low').
